category_sources: source_facts.description says Conventional Commits toolbox; official Cocogitto docs call it the conventional commit toolbox.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cocogitto; official documentation uses Cocogitto as the project name.
docs_sources: Official Cocogitto documentation is hosted at the dedicated docs domain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/cocogitto/cocogitto, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe conventional commits, changelog, release profiles, and Git log tooling.
